{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Twin Star emblem
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Twin Star emblem]] is worn on [[Jai Long]]'s outer robe.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Actions taken while wearing the [[Twin Star emblem]] are attributed to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
